settings.title: What's included
settings.content: All four pieces, one place: the 4-sided bar necklace, the cuff bracelet, the keychain, and the coordinates ring — every piece laser-engraved with your coordinates. Sizing and care details for each piece go here.

settings.title: How engraving works
settings.content: 1. Enter your coordinates once (or tap “Find my coordinates”) — we lay them out on every piece exactly as engraved: latitude on the necklace front, longitude on the back, the full pair on the bracelet, keychain, and ring. 2. Add up to two more necklace sides free, or engrave any piece with its own line — a different place for each person, if you like. 3. We send a photo proof of the whole set before it ships.

settings.atc_label: Add to cart — free engraving on all four pieces
